ohtani.title: Freddie Freeman hits two homers to fuel Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman crushes two home runs, while Andy Pages hits a go-ahead sac fly in the 9th to lead the Dodgers to a 5-4 win over the Padres

imanaga.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
imanaga.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

suzuki.title: Jacob Misiorowski fans eight batters in Brewers' win
suzuki.blurb: Jacob Misiorowski fans eight batters and Brice Turang hits a home run in their 5-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Jarren Duran shows off with homer in Red Sox win
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran puts on a show with three-run homer and stellar defense in Red Sox 7-1 win over the Royals

okamoto.title: Ben Rice crushes go-ahead homer in Yankees' win
okamoto.blurb: Ben Rice's go-ahead two-run homer and Ryan McMahon's three-run homer power Yankees' to a 5-4 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Meidroth, Benintendi lead White Sox comeback win
murakami.blurb: White Sox battle back in the top of the 9th with infield singles from Chase Meidroth and Andrew Benintendi for a 2-1 win over the Mariners

matsui.title: Gavin Sheets crushes two homers in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Gavin Sheets has a huge night in Seattle, going 3-3 with two home runs and a double in the Padres' 8-3 victory over the Mariners
